name: pdh_check
explanation: pdh_check is the generic Windows Performance Counter (PDH) framework: the user must declare which `countersetname` to query and supply a list of `[<COUNTER_NAME>, <METRIC_NAME>, <METRIC_TYPE>]` mappings. The check class is a thin shim over `PDHBaseCheck` and contributes no opinion about which counter set to monitor. There is no upstream system to fingerprint — every deployment is bespoke. This is pattern J: user-supplied generic check template. The optional remote-host mode (`host` + `username` + `password` via the `pdh_legacy` template) only deepens the credential gap.
notes: Pattern J (user-supplied generic check template). Sibling of windows_performance_counters and wmi_check — the integration is the configuration template, not a service binding.
